name: Sprout Social vs Synup Social
hero_summary: The secret to social media success? Engaging your audience with great, relevant content. Switch from Sprout Social, and start using a platform that works for you - creating AI-generated posts, doing trend and competitor research, analyzing engagement post-by-post, and more. In a toss-up between Sprout Social and Synup Social, the choice is obvious. With better features at a competitive price, it’s no surprise that customers love Synup Social!
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_heading: Get inspired to create with ease
section_2_summary: Good social media management tools must be reliable, efficient, and cost-effective. Synup Social wins over Sprout Social on all of these, and more. With superior analytics, advanced multi-brand and multi-location management capabilities, inspired content creation, and more, Synup Social will save your brand time and money. Although Sprout Social is widely recognized as an excellent platform due to its many useful features and integrations, it doesn’t measure up. You’ll see the night-and-day difference once you experience Synup Social:
section_2_slider_1_heading: Unique post ideas & AI-powered content creation
section_2_slider_1_summary: Post creation is our specialty. Sprout Social leaves you to your own devices with content creation. But Synup Social is powered by AI, so you can revive your best posts automatically, stay inspired with automated trend research, and let Synup Social write your posts for you. Get ready to be inspired!
section_2_slider_2_summary: Sprout Social’s approval workflow is limited in scope - and comes at an extra cost. Synup Social enables content teams to manage all of their content with a collaborative approval workflow. Supervisors and clients can easily approve posts and provide feedback, ensuring that every published post adheres to your brand's distinct voice.
section_2_step_3_summary: Sprout Social leaves you to your own devices when it comes to content optimization. Synup Social recommends the best time to post based on your past posts’ performance and when your audience is the most active - so you get more eyes on your content. Synup Social gives you recommendations and insights that will change the game, from the best time to post to post-by-post analytics, so you can nail it every time.
section_2_slider_4_summary: Synup Social helps brands with multiple locations manage their social profiles easily from one platform. Agency users and resellers can manage social media for multiple brands using one account. Sprout Social lacks proper support for multi-brand management and charges for adding users, making multi-location management a hassle while Synup Social allows scheduling posts for multiple locations or brands at once.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over Sprout Social?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: With robust analytics and advanced content creation abilities, Synup Social empowers your team to be more productive and inspired while driving results. With Synup Social, businesses can pick and choose which features they want to pay for, creating a customized social media management solution instead of paying for unwanted features. Synup Social's support team is quick to respond and very knowledgeable, unlike Sprout Social's team (which has been criticized for being slow and unhelpful) - plus a huge knowledge library and extensive training resources for users. seo.title: Sprout Social Alternative - Compare Features & Pricing
seo.description: Looking for a Sprout Social alternative? Synup offers a comprehensive comparison of features and pricing for the top social media management tools. Compare and choose the best fit for your business needs.
